records.snippet: Full list of US cities, states, and counties with columns for city, state short name, state full name, county, and city alias; ideal for mapping a state input to its cities.
Extended US cities dataset including ZIP codes in addition to city, state, and county fields; suitable for richer state-to-city lookup tasks and validation.
Top 1,000 US cities with state, population, latitude, and longitude; a smaller, cleaner input option for testing state-to-city lookup on common destinations.
